Dafne Gallardo (Latin American Spanish) }} | aliases = Gefn | birth = September 6th | stadium = 1 }} {{HeroTabs}} '''Freja''' is a [[Sub-Roles#Recon|Recon]] [[Roles#Damage|Damage]] [[Heroes|hero]] in ''[[Overwatch 2|Overwatch]]''. She was released in [[Season/2022-2026#Season_16:_Stadium|Season 16]] on 22 April 2025, making her the 43rd hero to be added to the game. ==Overview== Freja's kit is built for players who thrive on accuracy, agility, and pure tactical domination. She is well suited for players who thrive on precision and positioning.2025-03-18, [https://overwatch.blizzard.com/en-us/news/24178100/?utm_source=ow2-hero-free-trial-3-20250321&utm Season 15 Midseason: Collab, Crossbow, and Chaos]. ''Blizzard Entertainment'', accessed on 2025-03-22 Her kit combines high mobility with precision ranged attacks.2025-03-31, [https://9meters.com/entertainment/games/juno-overwatch-latest-news Overwatch 2 Season 16 Is Coming This April And Could Be The Boldest Update Yet]. ''9 Meters'', accessed on 2025-04-03 File:Icon-Freja.png|'''3D portrait''' File:Freja Hero.png|'''2D portrait''' ==Abilities== ===Passive Abilities=== {{Sub-Role passive|Recon}} {{Ability details |ability_name = Bounty Hunting |ability_image = Bounty_Hunting.png |old_description = |official_description = Every 3 Final Blows, gain bonus ultimate charge. |ability_type = Passive Ability |ability_video = |ability_details = * 25% [[ultimate charge]] is granted over 1.9 seconds upon the third final blow. * If Freja reaches 3 stacks when her ultimate ability is already available, the refund is stored and Freja gains the bonus charge after using her ultimate. More than one refund cannot be stored. * The progress is indicated next to the ultimate meter. * The progress persists even after being eliminated. * Ultimate final blows also count toward the bonus. * Self-damage final blows with {{al|Take Aim}} and {{al|Bola Shot}} do not count toward the bonus. * {{al|B.O.B.}} counts as a [[deployable]] and therefore does not count toward the bonus. * Upon receiving the bonus after eliminating the third enemy, a money animation will play above them. }} ===Weapons=== {{Ability details | ability_name = Revdraw Crossbow | ability_image = Revdraw_Crossbow.png | official_description = Rapidly fire automatic bolts. | ability_type = Weapon;;Hip Fire | shot_type = {{proj|proj}} | headshot = ✓ | ammo = {{#vardefineecho: revdraw ammo|15}} | damage = {{#vardefineecho: revdraw damage|30}} | fire_rate = {{tt|4.81 shots/s|0.208s recovery}} | reload_time = 1.6 seconds | spread = 1.5 degrees (max, horizontal only) | pradius = 0.175 meters | pspeed = 125 m/s | ability_keywords = critical::travel time | ability_video = | ability_details = * Damage per second: {{CalcDPS|d={{#var:revdraw damage}}|t=0.208}} while firing ({{CalcDPS|d={{#var:revdraw damage}}|t=0.208|a={{#var:revdraw ammo}}|r=1.6}} overall w/ reload) * Can be fired while Take Aim is reloading. * Maximum spread is reached at 12 shots. | dps = 120.19 while firing (79.45 overall w/ reload) }} {{Ability details | ability_name = Take Aim | ability_image = Take_Aim.png | official_description = Slow down your momentum to take aim with a high speed explosive bolt. {{tt|1.87 m/s|H:1, V:1.5}} (explosion) | ability_keywords = area of effect;;spherical::hinder::reloads::self-damage::travel time::immobilize | ability_details = * If an enemy is directly hit by the bola, they will take additional damage and cause nearby enemies to be pulled to them. ** The main target will be [[Status effect#Mobility lock|hindered]], locking them out of movement abilities. * After the bola impacts, it will deal periodic damage in an area for 1.4 seconds, slowing enemies within by 45%, and will then explode dealing damage in the area. ** Deals total of 200 damage to the main target and up to 175 damage to other enemies over the duration. * Slows Freja by 90% during the final 0.5 seconds of the cast. }} == Perks == === Minor Perks === A Minor [[Perk]] is unlocked at level 2. {{Ability details | ability_name = Relentless Barrage | ability_image = Relentless_Barrage.png | ability_type = Minor Perk | official_description = Direct hits with Take Aim refund 8 automatic bolt ammo. | ability_details = }} {{Ability details | ability_name = Momentum Boost | ability_image =Momentum_Boost.png | ability_type = Minor Perk | official_description = Quick Dash distance is increased by 20%. | mspeed = {{tt|23.3 m/s|H:22.6, V:5.8}} (horizontal input)
12.3 m/s (upward, no input) | ability_details = }} === Major perks === A Major [[Perk]] is unlocked at level 3. {{Ability details | ability_name = Aerial Recovery | ability_image =Aerial_Recovery.png | ability_type = Major Perk | official_description = After using Updraft, heal for 30 health per second until Freja touches the ground. | heal = 30 per second | ability_details = }} {{Ability details | ability_name = Rising Winds | ability_image = Perk_Rising_Winds.png | ability_type = Major Perk | official_description = Updraft gains an additional charge but has 20% reduced height. | ability_details = }} == Hero-specific options == {|class ="listtable" ! Setting name !! Options !! Description |- | '''Relative aim sensitivity while zoomed''' | 1% ... 100% (default: 47.50%) | Multiplier to base aim sensitivity while zoomed. |- | rowspan="2"| '''Hold Quick Dash to engage Take Aim''' | Off (default) | Holding Quick Dash does not activate Take Aim. |- | On | Holding the Quick Dash input activates Take Aim. |- | rowspan="2" |'''Double Jump activates Quick Dash''' |Off (default) | Double Jump does nothing. |- |On |Double jumping activates Quick Dash. Holding double jump does not activate Take Aim if "Hold Quick Dash to engage Take Aim" is on. |} == Stadium == Freja is a playable hero in [[Stadium]] game mode. See [[Freja/Stadium]] for a list of hero-specific Items and Powers. == Strategy == {{Stub-section}} == Match-Ups and Team Synergy == {{Stub-section}} When fighting Tanks, Freja has '''"Risk"''' ratings, ranging on a scale of 5 levels. This is because Freja primary focus, like any other DPS, is to pressure and eliminate the enemy team's Supports and other Damage heroes, with Tanks taking a lower priority: *''Extreme Risk'' '''|''' ''High Risk'' '''|''' ''Medium Risk'' '''|''' ''Low Risk'' '''|''' ''Very Low Risk'' When fighting DPS & Supports, Freja has '''"Priority Targeting"''' & measures of '''"Risk"''' ranging on a scale of 5 levels. These heroes often pose the greatest threat to Freja or are key targets to eliminate: *''Very Strong Vs.'' '''|''' ''Strong Vs.'' '''|''' ''Even/Neutral Vs.'' '''|''' ''Weak Vs.'' '''|''' ''Very Weak Vs.'' *''Extremely High Priority'' '''|''' ''High Priority'' '''|''' ''Medium Priority'' '''|''' ''Low Priority'' '''|''' ''Very Low Priority'' Synergies are also graded on a scale {{AchievementTable/End}} {{clear}} ==Trivia== [[File:Freja-snow.jpg|thumb|Freja]] *Her abilities bear resemblance to [[Huntress]]'s. *Freja's forename is the same as that of [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Freyja Freyja]; a goddess from Norse mythology. Her surname, Skov, is of Danish origin and means "forest." *Correspondence between Freja and Maximilien can be found on [[Circuit Royal]].2025-03-27, [https://www.reddit.com/r/Overwatch/comments/1jknhhg/has_anyone_seen_the_updated_circuit_royale_sombra/ Has anyone seen the updated Circuit Royale Sombra easter egg?]. ''Reddit'', accessed on 2025-03-28 ===Misc. Character Information=== *Freja only takes the "hard jobs" in regards to her bounties.''[[Overwatch 2]]'', ''[[Freja/Quotes|Freja Quotes]]'' *Freja often works for Maximilien, but she is not an employee of his. In her words, she calls the shots as often as Maximilien does. *Freja's favourite animal is the stoat. *Freja's cape uses [[lev rim]] technology. ===Development=== [[File:FrejaConcept.png|thumb|Concept art]] Freja was first revealed as part of Blizzard's 2025 Overwatch 2 spotlight. Her internal codename was "Winddasher", referring to her wind-related abilities.12-02-2025, [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Cf5dPQ7YeE8&ab_channel=PlayOverwatch Overwatch 2 Spotlight]. ''YouTube'', accessed on 12-02-2025' Freja was available for early trial from March 21 to 24, 2025.{{Cite web|url=https://x.com/PlayOverwatch/status/1900230381564998098?t=6x_Mqt_JUE44aFM3Hktk7A |author=@PlayOverwatch |title=Overwatch announcing Freja early trial and stories |quote=Get ready for a bountiful week of lore with our favorite new bounty hunter 🏹 📺 Hero Trailer - Mar 19 📚 Motion Comic...}} She was positively received by players, who likened her to being a cross between [[Echo]] and [[Hanzo]], with some elements from [[Sojourn]]. ==== Removed abilities ==== {{Ability details | removed = 1 | ability_name = Frost Bolts | ability_image = Frost_Bolts.png | ability_type = Minor Perk | official_description = Enemies hit by 3 regular bolts in quick succession are slowed by 20% for 2 seconds. | mspeed_slow = {{tt|-20%|4.4 m/s}} | duration = 2 seconds | ability_details = * ''Removed in Season 18.'' * The counter resets if the player is not hit again within 0.5 seconds. Missing a shot does not reset the counter. * Cannot trigger again on the same target until the slow has ended. }} {{Ability details | removed = 1 | ability_name = Tracking Instinct | ability_image = Tracking_Instinct.png | ability_type = Minor Perk | official_description = Critical health enemies are revealed to you. | ability_details = * ''Removed in Season 18.'' * Enemies revealed this way can be pinged through walls. }} {{Ability details | removed = 1 | ability_name = Ready to Hunt | ability_image = Updraft.png | ability_type = Major Perk | official_description = Updraft grants a temporary free use of Quick Dash. | duration = 3 seconds | ability_details = * ''Removed in Season 18.'' }} {{Ability details | removed = 1 | ability_name = Hunters Instinct | ability_image = Hunters_Instinct.png | ability_type = Minor Perk | official_description = Direct hits with Take Aim reveal enemies to Freja for 3 seconds. | duration = 3 seconds | ability_details = * ''Removed in Season 1: Conquest.'' }} ==Media== ===Concept Art=== File:freja-heart-of-courage-skin-concept.jpg|Heart of Courage Skin Concept Art by Angela Song File:freja-heart-of-courage-weapon-concept.jpg|Heart of Courage Skin Weapon Concept Art by Angela Song File:freja-heart-of-courage-weapon-concept-2.jpg|Heart of Courage Skin Accessories Concept Art by Angela Song ===Videos=== {{#ev:youtube|GM85xnXH6JQ|400|inline}} {{#ev:youtube|pIKLdhMtEd0|400|inline}} {{#ev:youtube|LriEejDFSnQ|400|inline}} {{#ev:youtube|NSZ1t4u54DA|400|inline}} == Balance Change Logs == {{ChangelogsTabber |owpvp = {{PatchTableElement|2026-02-10| {{al|Hunters Instinct}} - Minor Perk * Removed. {{al|Relentless Barrage}} - Minor Perk * Moved from Major to Minor. Rising Winds - Major Perk * New Major Perk. * Updraft gains an additional charge but has 20% reduced height. }} {{PatchTableElement|2026-01-08| {{DevComment|The primary-fire adjustments improve Freja’s baseline weapon consistency and reduce her reliance on empowered bolts. Increasing Take Aim’s damage restores an important breakpoint against 225-health targets while keeping its overall impact in check.}} {{al|Revdraw Crossbow}} primary fire * Maximum spread reduced from 2 to 1.5 degrees. * Spread now ramps up more slowly and fans out horizontally. {{al|Take Aim}} * Impact damage increased from 30 to 35. }} {{PatchTableElement|2025-12-09| {{al|Revdraw Crossbow}} * Damage increased from 25 to 30. {{al|Take Aim}} * Direct Hit damage reduced from 40 to 30. * Explosion damage reduced from 90 to 80. {{al|Quick Dash}} * Distance traveled increased by 15%. {{al|Bola Shot}} * Hinder duration on the hit target increased from 1.2 to 1.4. * Area slow increased from 25% to 45%. }} {{PatchTableElement|2025-10-14| {{al|Relentless Barrage}} – Major Perk * Ammo refunded increased from 4 to 8. }} {{PatchTableElement|2025-08-26| {{al|Frost Bolts}} - Minor Perk * Removed. {{al|Tracking Instinct}} - Minor Perk * Removed. {{al|Hunters Instinct}} - Minor Perk * New Minor Perk. * Direct hits with Take Aim reveal enemies to Freja for 3 seconds. {{al|Momentum Boost}} - Minor Perk * New Minor Perk. * Quick Dash distance is increased by 20%. {{al|Ready to Hunt}} - Major Perk * Removed. {{al|Aerial Recovery}} - Major Perk * New Major Perk. * After using Updraft, heal for 30 health per second until Freja touches the ground. }} {{PatchTableElement|2025-07-22| {{al|Revdraw Crossbow}} - Primary Fire * Primary fire damage reduced from 30 to 25. * Maximum ammo increased from 12 to 15. }} {{PatchTableElement|2025-05-29| {{al|Take Aim}} - Secondary Fire * Slow momentum time reduced from 1.5 to 1.0 second. * Reload time increased from 1.35 to 1.5 seconds. {{al|Quick Dash}} - Ability 1 * Cooldown increased from 4.0 to 4.5 seconds. {{al|Updraft}} - Ability 2 * Cooldown increased from 10 to 12 seconds. }} {{PatchTableElement|2025-05-20| {{DevComment|Developer comments: Freja has continued to climb in win-rate now that players have become accustomed to her kit. We are partially reverting the Quick Dash cooldown to reduce her airtime and frequency of explosive bolts.}} {{al|Quick Dash}} * Cooldown increased from 3.5 to 4 seconds. }} {{PatchTableElement|2025-04-25| {{al|Quick Dash}} * Cooldown reduced from 4.5 to 3.5 seconds. {{al|Updraft}} * Cooldown reduced from 12 to 10 seconds. }} {{PatchTableElement|2025-04-22| ; New Hero * Freja is added to the Hero Roster * Freja is now playable in Competitive Play ; Changes from early trial {{DevComment|Developer Comments: We received positive feedback during Freja's Hero trial, and it's exciting to see how much you enjoy experimenting with her kit. However, we’ve noticed that Freja is struggling to keep up with other Damage Heroes, particularly in terms of lethality. So, we're adjusting the time it takes for her to earn her minor perk, bringing it in line with other Heroes. Additionally, we’re increasing the number of shots before her max spread kicks in, making her Revdraw Crossbow more reliable at all ranges. Finally, while Freja’s Bola Shot was charging quickly, its effectiveness was somewhat lacking. We’re boosting both its damage and radius slightly, ensuring it can better secure eliminations when it lands.}} * Time to earn Minor Perk reduced by 18%. {{al|Revdraw Crossbow}} * Number of shots before max spread increased from 8 to 12. {{al|Bola Shot}} * Bola Shot Damage and Explosion radius increased from 5 to 5.5 meters. * Bola Shot damage over time increased from 75 to 90. }} {{PatchTableElement|2025-03-21| ;Early Trial * Damage Role * Not available in Competitive Play during the Hero Trial {{al|Revdraw Crossbow}} * Primary Fire. * Rapidly fire automatic bolts. {{al|Take Aim}} * Secondary Fire. * Slow your momentum to take aim with a high-speed explosive bolt. Using Quick Dash refreshes Take Aim. {{al|Quick Dash}} * Ability 1. * Vault in the direction you're moving and refresh Take Aim. {{al|Updraft}} * Ability 2. * Launch upward with a gust of wind. {{al|Bola Shot}} * Ultimate ability. * Fire an explosive bola. Hitting an enemy wraps them up and pulls in other nearby enemies. {{al|Bounty Hunting}} * Passive ability. * Every 3 Final Blows, gain bonus ultimate charge. {{al|Frost Bolts}} * Minor Perk. * Enemies hit by 3 regular bolts in quick succession are slowed by 20% for 2 seconds. {{al|Tracking Instinct}} * Minor Perk. * Critical health enemies are revealed to you. {{al|Ready to Hunt}} * Major Perk. * Updraft grants a temporary free use of Quick Dash. {{al|Relentless Barrage}} * Major Perk. * Direct hits with Take Aim refund 4 automatic bolt ammo. }} |owstadium={{#section-h:Freja/Stadium|Balance Change Log}} }} ==References== {{Heroes}} [[Category:Heroes]] [[Category:Overwatch members]] [[Category: Danish characters]]
